draft:
Finally tried the dim sum at Koi Palace and I'm obsessed 🥟✨ The har gow was perfectly translucent with a delicate shrimp filling, and the XLB were bursting with soup on the first bite. Pro tip: arrive right when they open to beat the weekend rush — the wait for a table can stretch past an hour. The turnip cake and egg tarts were also standout. Easily worth the trek to Daly City.

#DimSum #KoiPalace #DalyCity #BayAreaEats #ChineseFood #Foodie #SFBayArea
note: Normal restaurant review — safe content, should pass OK

draft:
Conquered Mission Peak at dawn and the Bay Area lit up below me like a living map 🏔️🌅 Left the trailhead at 5:30am and had the whole ridge to myself for about 20 minutes before the runners started arriving. The final push to the pole is steep and rocky — poles help a lot. Total round trip: about 6 miles with 2,100 ft elevation gain. Bring more water than you think you need, there's no refill on trail.

#MissionPeak #BayAreaHiking #EastBay #HikingBayArea #Fremont #Sunrise #HikingCommunity
note: Hiking post with practical tips — safe content, should pass OK

draft:
If you haven't been to Filoli yet, add it to your list immediately 🌸🌿 This National Trust historic site in Woodside has 16 acres of formal gardens that peak in spring — the tulip and wisteria displays are genuinely breathtaking. The house tour is worth the extra ticket and takes about 45 minutes. Parking is free and plentiful. Members get in free every visit, so if you're planning more than two trips a year it pays for itself quickly.

#Filoli #Woodside #BayAreaGardens #PeninsulaLife #NationalTrust #WeekendsInBayArea #GardenLovers
note: Garden recommendation — safe, factual, no concerning content

draft:
Shibuya Crossing at midnight hits different 🌃🇯🇵 Tokyo at its most electric — every light in every direction, and when the walk signal turns green it's hundreds of people weaving between each other perfectly without a single collision. I stood on the second floor of Starbucks for 30 minutes just watching the flow. This city runs on a different kind of organized chaos and I am fully here for it.

#Shibuya #ShibuyaCrossing #Tokyo #Japan #TravelJapan #NightPhotography #CityLife
note: International travel post — safe content about Shibuya Crossing
